retry_reason: Failure indicates the action does not exist; retrying without creating the action will also fail.
contract_summary: Get-wrapper for tc actions by index. Looks up an action in the per-net action table (or via a custom lookup) and returns it with an elevated refcount. On success (return 0), *a points to a referenced action; on error (negative errno), no reference is acquired. The caller must release the reference with a corresponding put (e.g., tcf_action_put) when done.

judge.reason: The function's sole purpose is to find a tc action by index and return it with an elevated refcount; the only variation is whether to use a custom lookup or the standard tcf_idr_search, both of which are get operations.
